title: add a source debug build
body:
Adds `make debug`.. allows a developer to build a source debuggable version of skopeo. For example, using delve.

Signed-off-by: Mike Brown brownwm@us.ibm.com

comments.body: @mtrmac Switched to a make ... DEBUG=1 pattern

Bah, I can’t merge this manually it seems.

@mikebrow do you want to try rebasing again?  Sorry about that… Or we can wait a few days for @runcom or somebody else with admin status on this project to allow force-pushing.
Saw the merge and stopped watching for additional messages, sry bout that.  Rebased.
